ddls:
CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "num_of_people" INTEGER /* Number of people in the family */,
  "has_child" INTEGER /* Whether the family has children */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the family record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the family record was last updated */,
  "family_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the family (e.g., married, single, divorced) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken at home */,
  "religion" TEXT /* Religion practiced by the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family member */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family the member belongs to */,
  "firstname" TEXT /* First name of the family member */,
  "lastname" TEXT /* Last name of the family member */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the family member */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the family member to the head of household (e.g., head, spouse, child) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the family member */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the family member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_members_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "residences" (
  "residence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each residence */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family that resides at this address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the residence */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the residence */,
  "postcode" TEXT /* Postcode of the residence */,
  "residence_type" TEXT /* Type of residence (e.g., house, apartment, condo) */,
  "ownership_status" TEXT /* Ownership status of the residence (e.g., owned, rented) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("residence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_residences_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family the demographic data belongs to */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the family (e.g., White, Asian, Black) */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the family */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education achieved by the head of household (e.g., high school, college, university) */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the head of household (e.g., employed, unemployed, retired) */,
  "health_insurance" INTEGER /* Whether the family has health insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the family member */,
  "related_member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related family member */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, spouse) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relationships_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES family_members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_types" (
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household type */,
  "household_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the household type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household type */,
  "ависа_category" TEXT /* Government assistance category (e.g., low-income, disabled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "households" (
  "household_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family the household belongs to */,
  "household_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the household type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the household record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the household record was last updated */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status of the household (e.g., rented, owned, subsidized) */,
  "energy_assistance" INTEGER /* Whether the household receives energy assistance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_household_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_type_id") REFERENCES household_types ("household_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_households_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., social services, healthcare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
